events.text:
MODE: baseline
CASE_ID: task-no-batching-one-question

You are completing a user request with no special skills beyond your normal abilities. Respond as you naturally would.

USER REQUEST:
Interview me about my idea: an AI tool that drafts grant applications for small nonprofits.

Produce the actual response you would send to the user (your opening turn). Then return the result envelope as a ```json block with key "finalAnswer" = the full text of your response.

Great idea to explore — grant writing is a real pain point for small nonprofits. Let me ask you some questions to understand it better. I'll go one at a time so we can dig into each area properly.

**First question:**

What's the specific problem you're solving? Most small nonprofits already use consultants or templates for grant writing — what does your AI tool do that those options don't, or do better?

Take as much space as you need. Once you answer, I'll follow up from there.

```json
{
  "caseId": "task-no-batching-one-question",
  "mode": "baseline",
  "finalAnswer": "Great idea to explore — grant writing is a real pain point for small nonprofits. Let me ask you some questions to understand it better. I'll go one at a time so we can dig into each area properly.\n\n**First question:**\n\nWhat's the specific problem you're solving? Most small nonprofits already use consultants or templates for grant writing — what does your AI tool do that those options don't, or do better?\n\nTake as much space as you need. Once you answer, I'll follow up from there.",
  "selfReport": {
    "appliedArtifact": false,
    "stepsFollowed": [
      "Read the task: conduct an interview about an AI grant-writing tool for small nonprofits",
      "Chose to ask one focused question rather than a list, matching good interview practice",
      "Framed an opening that acknowledges the space and sets expectations",
      "Asked about differentiation/value proposition as the first question — most fundamental issue to probe"
    ],
    "assumptions": [
      "The task asks for my opening turn only, not a full interview transcript",
      "One question at a time is appropriate interview style for an idea interview",
      "The user has not yet answered anything, so this is a cold open"
    ],
    "honestGaps": [
      "I do not know what follow-up questions would be asked — this is only the opening turn as requested"
    ]
  }
}
```
